pi_items.source: Oracle Analytics Desktop saves workbooks as .dva files by default.
Windows default Documents path for user Docker, combined with the expected .dva filename.
Oracle Analytics documentation confirms RSUM calculates the running (cumulative) sum.
Column "Product Category" exists in the provided sample_order_lines2023.xlsx and order_lines.csv data.
Column "Sales" exists in the provided sample_order_lines2023.xlsx and order_lines.csv data.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Oracle Analytics workbook named "Cumulative_Growth_Analysis.dva" using a synthetic sample sales dataset. To create a cumulative trend, it requires aggregating the "Sales" measure over time, broken down by the "Product Category" dimension, using the "RSUM" (running sum) function. Both "Sales" and "Product Category" exist as columns in the provided dataset.
